# fly_machine (Data Source)

Reads a Fly.io machine.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_machine" "example" {
  app = "my-existing-app"
  id  = "abc123"
}

output "machine_state" {
  value = data.fly_machine.example.state
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) App name the machine belongs to.
- `id` (String) Machine ID.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) When the machine was created.
- `image` (String) Docker image the machine is running.
- `instance_id` (String) Instance ID of the machine.
- `name` (String) Machine name.
- `private_ip` (String) Private IPv6 address of the machine.
- `region` (String) Region where the machine is deployed.
- `state` (String) Current machine state.
- `updated_at` (String) When the machine was last updated.
